A·01ABOUT SHREEJAN

Built for the grind of competitive exams

Founded by Nandkishor Pundkar, Shreejan Study Centre is a dedicated abhyasika in the heart of Shegaon — a calm, disciplined room where the only thing competing for your attention is the syllabus. No noise, no distractions, no excuses.

शांत, स्पर्धा परीक्षांसाठी उत्तम अभ्यासिका — येथे फक्त अभ्यासावर लक्ष केंद्रित करा.

Whether you're prepping for UPSC, MPSC, NEET, JEE or any other competitive exam, every seat here is set up the same way: a private cabin, a charging point, your own light, and hours of uninterrupted focus.

LOCATION
Mauli Tower, Jagdamba Square, Shegaon
OPEN HOURS
8:00 AM – 10:00 PM, all days
BEST FOR
UPSC · MPSC · NEET · JEE
ENVIRONMENT
Silent, disciplined, focus-first
CCTV monitored
Safe for everyone, every hour
B·02PRICING

Simple, honest pricing

One plan. No hidden charges. Just a seat that's yours for as long as you need it.

★ Best Value Plan
₹800/ month
Refundable security deposit: ₹500 — returned in full when you leave
  • Your own private study cabin
  • High-speed WiFi & charging point
  • Open 8 AM – 10 PM, every day
  • No long-term lock-in — pay monthly

C·03FACILITIES

Everything you need to focus, nothing that breaks it

Every cabin at Shreejan is set up identically — so the seat you get is exactly as good as the one next to it.

High-Speed WiFi

Stay connected for mock tests & research without buffering.

Ergonomic Chairs

Comfortable seating built for long study sessions.

Charging Point

A power socket at every single seat — never run out of battery.

Personal LED Light

Your own bright, glare-free light at every cabin.

Eat Your Own Food

No restrictions — bring your own snacks & meals.

RO Water Cooler

Cold, purified drinking water always on hand.

Separate Toilets

Clean, separate washrooms for ladies & gents.

CCTV Security

The full hall is monitored, around the clock.

Silent & Disciplined

A strict no-noise policy — every seat respects the next.

Spacious Seating

Wide aisles, real desk space — never cramped.

Backup Electricity

Power cuts won't cost you study hours.

Study-Focused Atmosphere

The whole room is designed around one job: focus.

UPSC · MPSC · NEET · JEE

Purpose-built for every major competitive exam.
